checks.name: scenarios.same_schema
checks.message: S1, S2, and S3 use identical schemas for all 11 canonical tables

checks.name: scenarios.S2_weather_signal
checks.message: S2 target nodes have higher mean rainfall, flood risk, and road factor than S1

checks.name: scenarios.S2_navigation_closure_signal
checks.message: S2 produces at least one explicit target-node water closure instead of only a finite penalty

checks.name: scenarios.S3_diesel_signal
checks.message: S3 diesel follows the configured multi-step shock path and reaches the 1.18x terminal level

checks.name: scenarios.S3_fuel_reaches_freight
checks.message: S3 road freight exposes an increasing fuel_cost_factor tied to the staged diesel shock

checks.name: scenarios.S3_fleet_or_demand_signal
checks.message: S3 has lower road availability or higher road demand than S1

checks.name: scenarios.pack_hashes_differ
checks.message: S1, S2, and S3 canonical data packs have pairwise-distinct aggregate hashes
